brand.name: Polyonics
brand.note_en: ETIA supplies Polyonics; ETIA is not the manufacturer.
brand.note_zh: ETIA 供应 Polyonics;ETIA 并非制造商。

categories.title_zh: 回流焊与波峰焊聚酰亚胺PCB标签
categories.lede_en: Labels applied before soldering and cleaning that must stay attached and readable after reflow, wave solder, flux, solvents and repeated harsh washes.
categories.lede_zh: 焊接与清洗前粘贴、且必须在回流焊、波峰焊、助焊剂、溶剂及多轮严苛清洗后保持粘接与可读的标签。

categories.title_zh: 非回流焊聚酰亚胺PCB标签
categories.lede_en: Durable PCB identification for harsh cleaning and moderate heat where the label does not pass a full reflow profile — choose by the actual process, not the highest possible temperature.
categories.lede_zh: 面向严苛清洗与中等热暴露、无需经历完整回流焊曲线的耐久PCB标识 —— 按实际工艺选材,而非一味追求最高耐温。

categories.lede_en: Applied after manufacturing for serial numbers, barcodes, component tracking and finished-board identification — selected for the finished surface and service environment.
categories.lede_zh: 制造完成后添加序列号、条码、元件追踪与成品线路板信息 —— 根据成品表面与使用环境选材。

categories.lede_en: A conversion / application-format page. The base material is chosen from the reflow, non-reflow or post-process pages, then converted for reliable automatic dispensing.
categories.lede_zh: 转换/贴标形式页面。基材从回流、非回流或后制程页选定后,再转换为可稳定自动剥离的卷材。

categories.lede_en: Temporary masking dots and inspection markers — removable, low-residue constructions. 'Removable' is process-dependent; residue changes after heat/chemistry.
categories.lede_zh: 临时遮蔽圆点与检验标记 —— 可移除、低残胶结构。'可移除'随工艺变化,残胶在热/化学后可能改变。

categories.lede_en: Permanent, high-contrast marking without thermal-transfer ribbon. The material and laser system must be qualified together; not the same as direct part marking.
categories.lede_zh: 无需热转印碳带的永久高对比标识。材料与激光系统必须共同验证;不等同于直接零件打标。

products.construction: 1 mil matte white polyimide, permanent acrylic adhesive for high-surface-energy substrates
products.brochure_direction_en: Low-profile matte white polyimide for compact assemblies through high-heat wave solder and repeated harsh PCB washes; no static-dissipative performance.
products.brochure_direction_zh: 低厚度哑白色聚酰亚胺,适合紧凑组件,可经受高温波峰焊与多轮严苛清洗;不具静电耗散性能。

products.construction: Amber polyimide for the most demanding high-heat processing
products.brochure_direction_en: Amber polyimide material for demanding ultra-high-temperature PCB processing.
products.brochure_direction_zh: 琥珀色聚酰亚胺,面向最严苛的超高温PCB工艺。

products.brochure_direction_en: Ultra-thin static-dissipative polyimide for ESD-sensitive components and controlled production areas.
products.brochure_direction_zh: 超薄静电耗散聚酰亚胺,用于ESD敏感器件与管控生产区。

products.product_name: Polyonics XF-101SE Ultra-Thin Gloss ESD Polyimide
products.brochure_direction_en: Ultra-thin gloss static-dissipative polyimide for ESD control through reflow and harsh wash.
products.brochure_direction_zh: 超薄亮面静电耗散聚酰亚胺,用于回流焊与严苛清洗中的ESD控制。

products.product_name: Polyonics XF-101ME Ultra-Thin Matte ESD Polyimide
products.brochure_direction_en: Ultra-thin matte static-dissipative polyimide; matte face supports high-contrast barcode imaging.
products.brochure_direction_zh: 超薄哑面静电耗散聚酰亚胺;哑面有利于高对比条码成像。

products.brochure_direction_en: Standard-profile gloss static-dissipative polyimide for ESD identification with a more substantial construction.
products.brochure_direction_zh: 标准厚度亮面静电耗散聚酰亚胺,提供较厚结构的ESD识别。

products.construction: Gloss polyimide engineered for harsh-wash print durability without a preheat step
products.brochure_direction_en: Gloss polyimide for harsh-wash print performance without relying on preheating.
products.brochure_direction_zh: 亮面聚酰亚胺,不依赖预热即可提升印字耐清洗性。

products.construction: Light-green polyimide for high-temperature process differentiation
products.brochure_direction_en: Light-green colour-coded high-temperature polyimide for process differentiation.
products.brochure_direction_zh: 浅绿色耐高温聚酰亚胺,用于工艺区分。

products.construction: Static-dissipative polyester (PET) for chemical/solvent resistance at moderate heat
products.brochure_direction_en: Static-dissipative PET for combined chemical/solvent resistance where full reflow heat is not required.
products.brochure_direction_zh: 静电耗散PET,用于无需完整回流焊高温、但需耐化学/溶剂的场景。
